_comment: Recorded LLM conversation for the talk demo. Two-turn loop: first turn emits 4 parallel tool calls covering the four LLM-free agents (capitalize/reverse/count_consonants/vowel_random); second turn synthesises the final report. The LLM-aware agents (feature_extractor/slogan_generator/translator) are intentionally omitted from this fixture because they would each call the same ScriptedLLMClient and exhaust it. Use with: python supervisor.py --dry-run --fixture tests/fixtures/talk_prompt_response.json --job demo "<talk prompt>"

responses.text:
Final report:

The text was analyzed by 4 parallel agents. capitalize uppercased the original; reverse produced the backwards-compatibility joke; count_consonants returned a numeric tally; vowel_random emitted a random ASCII string sized to twice the vowel count.

(This response was replayed from a recorded fixture for offline rehearsal — no LLM was contacted.)
